title: DONATIONS PROGRAM - 211info
text: GLIDE REVITALIZATION DONATIONS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts small donations of shelf-stable food, pet food, clothing, small appliances, compact furniture, and household goods. Cannot accept large appliances or big furniture. Supports individuals and families impacted by the March 2025 floods in Douglas County. 301 Glide Loop Drive Glide, OR 97443 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-4pm Email (541) 671-0189 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 671-0189 Main phone Main phone (541) 671-0189 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Douglas County Services: Animal Food/Supplies Donation Programs * Disaster/Emergency Issues Bedding/Linen Donation Programs * Disaster/Emergency Issues Cleaning Products * Disaster/Emergency Issues Clothing Donation Programs * Disaster/Emergency Issues Electronics/Small Appliance Donation Programs * Disaster/Emergency Issues Food Donation Programs * Disaster/Emergency Issues Kitchenware Donation Programs * Disaster/Emergency Issues Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs * Disaster/Emergency Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - CARMEN BERNAL COMPASSIONATE NURSING SCHOLARSHIP COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - GLIDE REVITALIZATION SKILLED TRADES SCHOLARSHIP DISASTER SERVICES - MARCH 2025 FLOOD RECOVERY SUPPORT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - UMPQUA FLASH ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
